---
title: "[Masterclass] Data Analysis: Planning and Preparing"
author: 
- Nature Masterclasses
publication: "Nature Masterclasses"
categories:

  - careers
href: https://masterclasses.nature.com/data-analysis-planning-and-preparing/19913800

journ: "Nature Masterclasses"

page: 
year: 
image: ""
pub_number: 
doi: 
---
